lines.speaker: Peasant
lines.text: Another traveler! You look like you have walked two maps in one week.

lines.speaker: Hero
lines.text: Feels longer than that. The forest edge was kinder than I feared.

lines.speaker: Peasant
lines.text: Take this bread. The road home is shorter when you are not hungry.

lines.speaker: Hero
lines.text: I owe you one. When I return I will bring salve for that arm.
